_comment: Reference MCP server configuration for ClaudeShop. Paste the relevant entries into your Claude Code settings (either ~/.claude.json globally or project-local via .claude/settings.json).

gitnexus.description: Code knowledge graph — blast radius before edits, callers/callees, process flows. Run `npx gitnexus analyze` once in the repo root before first use.

claude-mem.description: Session observation capture + vector recall. Stores observations in SQLite + Chroma; viewer at http://localhost:37777.

basic-memory.description: Local-first Markdown knowledge base. Writes to ./vault — fully Obsidian-compatible.

mempalace.description: L0-L3 palace memory — ~170-token boot, 96.6% retrieval for multi-hour sessions.

_instructions.register_one: claude mcp add gitnexus 'npx -y gitnexus mcp'

_recommended_extras.graphify: Install via pip: `pip install graphify && graphify install`. Not an MCP server — integrates via a PreToolUse hook.
_recommended_extras.agent-sdk: npm i @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk — use to script programmatic deploys.
